sentences.sentence: The world's population is expected to stablize at around nine billion.
sentences.translation: 预计世界人口将在约九十亿的水平上趋于稳定。

structure.text: The world's population
is expected
to stablize at around nine billion

difficult_points: is expected to 表示“预计会”，是不定式作主语补足语的被动结构。
原文 stablize 为 stabilize 的拼写异常，但不影响句意。

sentences.sentence: Will it be possible for nine billion people to have the lifestyle enjoyed today only by the wealthy?
sentences.translation: 九十亿人是否都有可能过上如今只有富人才享有的生活？

structure.text: Will it be possible
for nine billion people to have the lifestyle
enjoyed today only by the wealthy

difficult_points: it 是形式主语，真正的主语是 for nine billion people to have...。
enjoyed today only by the wealthy 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 lifestyle。

expressions.text: be possible for someone to do

sentences.sentence: One school of thought says no: not only should the majority of the world's people resign themselves to poverty forever, but rich nations must also revert to simpler lifestyles in order to save the planet.
sentences.translation: 一种观点认为不可能：世界上大多数人不仅得永远接受贫困，富裕国家也必须回归更简朴的生活方式，才能拯救地球。

structure.text: One school of thought says no
not only should the majority of the world's people resign themselves to poverty forever
but rich nations must also revert to simpler lifestyles
in order to save the planet

difficult_points: not only 位于分句开头触发部分倒装，因此 should 放在主语之前。
not only...but... 连接两项并列主张，冒号后的内容解释 says no 的具体含义。

sentences.sentence: Admittedly, there may be political or social barriers to achieving a rich world.
sentences.translation: 诚然，实现一个普遍富裕的世界可能会面临政治或社会障碍。

structure.text: Admittedly
there may be political or social barriers
to achieving a rich world

difficult_points: Admittedly 用于先承认一种限制，为后文转折让步。
barriers to 中 to 是介词，因此后接动名词 achieving。

sentences.sentence: But in fact there seems to be no insuperable physical or ecological reason why nine billion people should not achieve a comfortable lifestyle, using technology only slightly more advanced than that which we now possess.
sentences.translation: 但事实上，似乎不存在任何无法克服的物质或生态原因，能够阻止九十亿人仅凭比现有技术略先进一点的技术过上舒适生活。

structure.text: But in fact there seems to be no insuperable physical or ecological reason
why nine billion people should not achieve a comfortable lifestyle
using technology only slightly more advanced than that
which we now possess

difficult_points: why 引导的关系从句修饰 reason，should not 在此表达“没有理由不能做到”。
that 代指 technology，which we now possess 又进一步修饰 that。
using... 是方式状语，说明实现舒适生活所使用的手段。

sentences.sentence: In thinking about the future of civilization, we ought to start by asking w hat people want.
sentences.translation: 思考文明的未来时，我们应该先问一问人们想要什么。

structure.text: In thinking about the future of civilization
we
ought to start
by asking w hat people want

difficult_points: In thinking about... 相当于 when we think about...，说明情境。
by asking 表示采取的起始方式；原文 w hat 是 what 的断词异常。

sentences.sentence: The evidence demonstrates that as people get richer they w ant a greater range of personal technology, they want lots of room (preferably near or in natural surroundings) and they w ant greater speed in travel.
sentences.translation: 证据表明，随着人们变得富裕，他们会想拥有种类更多的个人科技产品、更多空间（最好靠近自然或身处自然环境），并追求更快的出行速度。

structure.text: The evidence demonstrates
that as people get richer they w ant a greater range of personal technology
they want lots of room (preferably near or in natural surroundings)
and they w ant greater speed in travel

difficult_points: as people get richer 是时间兼变化状语，表示“随着人们越来越富裕”。
that 后实际并列了三个需求分句；括号内容补充说明 room 的理想位置。
原文两处 w ant 均为 want 的断词异常。

sentences.sentence: More possessions, more space, more mobility.
sentences.translation: 更多财物、更大空间、更强流动性。

structure.text: More possessions
more space
more mobility

difficult_points: 这是省略谓语的三个并列名词短语，用来概括上一句的三类需求。
mobility 在此既包括出行能力，也包含自由移动的便利程度。

sentences.sentence: In the developed world, the personal technologies of the wealthy, including telephones, washing machines and ears, have become necessities within a generation or two.
sentences.translation: 在发达世界，富人使用的个人科技产品，包括电话、洗衣机和汽车，已经在一两代人的时间里变成了生活必需品。

structure.text: In the developed world
the personal technologies of the wealthy
including telephones, washing machines and ears
have become necessities within a generation or two

difficult_points: including... 是插入式补充，列举 personal technologies 的实例。
原文 ears 按语境应为 cars 的 OCR 错误；英文保留原样，译文按“汽车”理解。

sentences.sentence: Increasing productivity that results m decreasing costs for such goods has been responsible for the greatest gains in the standard of living, and there is every reason to believe that this will continue.
sentences.translation: 生产率提高使这类商品的成本下降，这一直是生活水平大幅提升的主要原因，而且我们完全有理由相信这种趋势还会继续。

structure.text: Increasing productivity that results m decreasing costs for such goods
has been responsible for the greatest gains in the standard of living
and there is every reason to believe
that this will continue

difficult_points: that results... 是定语从句，修饰 productivity；原文 results m 应按 results in 理解。
this 指生产率提高、成本下降并推动生活水平提升这一趋势。
there is every reason to believe 是强调“完全有理由相信”的存在句式。

expressions.text: there is every reason to believe

sentences.sentence: As affluence grows, the amount of energy and raw- materials used for production of machinery w ill therefore escalate.
sentences.translation: 随着社会日益富裕，用于制造机器的能源和原材料数量也会相应增加。

structure.text: As affluence grows
the amount of energy and raw- materials
used for production of machinery
w ill therefore escalate

difficult_points: used for... 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 energy and raw-materials。
As 表示“随着”；原文 w ill 为 will 的断词异常，raw- materials 也有异常空格。

sentences.sentence: But this need not mean an end to the machine age.
sentences.translation: 但这并不一定意味着机器时代的终结。

structure.text: But this
need not mean
an end to the machine age

difficult_points: this 指上一句所说能源和原材料消耗量上升。
need not 表示“不一定、未必”，而不是“没有必要去意味着”。

sentences.sentence: Rather than being throw n away, materials from old machinery can be recycled by manufacturers.
sentences.translation: 旧机器上的材料可以由制造商回收利用，而不必被丢弃。

structure.text: Rather than being throw n away
materials from old machinery
can be recycled
by manufacturers

difficult_points: Rather than being... 表示被否定的替代做法，与后面的 can be recycled 对照。
原文 throw n 是 thrown 的断词异常；两处 being/be recycled 都是被动意义。

sentences.sentence: And long before all fossil fuels are exhausted, their rising prices may compel industrial society not only to become more energy efficient but also to find alternative energy sources sufficient for the demands of an advanced technological civilization nuclear fission, nuclear fusion, solar energy, chemical photosynthesis, geothermal, biomass or some yet unknown source of energy.
sentences.translation: 而且，早在化石燃料全部耗尽之前，其不断上涨的价格就可能迫使工业社会不仅提高能源效率，还要寻找足以满足先进技术文明需求的替代能源，例如核裂变、核聚变、太阳能、化学光合作用、地热能、生物质能，或某种尚未知晓的能源。

structure.text: long before all fossil fuels are exhausted
their rising prices may compel industrial society
not only to become more energy efficient but also to find alternative energy sources
sufficient for the demands of an advanced technological civilization

difficult_points: their 指 fossil fuels；long before 强调价格压力会在燃料耗尽很久以前出现。
compel industrial society to... 是“迫使工业社会做……”，后接 not only...but also... 两个并列不定式。
civilization 后缺少预期的标点，随后是一串 alternative energy sources 的例子。

sentences.sentence: The growth of cities and suburbs is often seen as a threat to the environment.
sentences.translation: 城市和郊区的扩张常被视为对环境的威胁。

structure.text: The growth of cities and suburbs
is often seen
as a threat to the environment

difficult_points: be seen as 是被动结构，表示“被看作”。
growth 在此不是人口增长本身，而是城市与郊区范围的扩张。

sentences.sentence: However, in fact the increasing amount of land consumed by agriculture is a far greater danger than urban sprawl.
sentences.translation: 然而事实上，与城市蔓延相比，农业不断占用更多土地才是大得多的危险。

structure.text: However, in fact
the increasing amount of land consumed by agriculture
consumed by agriculture
is a far greater danger than urban sprawl

difficult_points: consumed by agriculture 是过去分词短语，修饰 land。
far 修饰比较级 greater，强调农业占地的危险大得多。

expressions.meaning_zh: 城市无序扩张；城市蔓延

sentences.sentence: Stopping the growth of farms is the best way to preserve many of the world's remaining wild areas.
sentences.translation: 遏制农田扩张，是保护世界许多残存荒野地区的最佳方式。

structure.text: Stopping the growth of farms
is the best way
to preserve many of the world's remaining wild areas

difficult_points: Stopping... 是动名词短语作主语，指停止农田面积继续增长。
to preserve... 后置修饰 way，说明这种方式要实现的目标。

sentences.sentence: But is a dramatic downsizing of farmland possible?
sentences.translation: 但大幅缩减农田面积真的可行吗？

structure.text: But is
a dramatic downsizing of farmland
possible

difficult_points: 这是一般疑问句，系动词 is 提至主语之前。
downsizing 原常用于组织或规模缩减，此处指大幅减少农田面积。

sentences.sentence: Thanks to the grow th of agricultural productivity, reforestation and 're-wilding' has been under way in the industrial countries for generations.
sentences.translation: 得益于农业生产率的提高，重新造林和“恢复荒野”已在工业化国家持续了好几代人。

structure.text: Thanks to the grow th of agricultural productivity
reforestation and 're-wilding'
has been under way
in the industrial countries for generations

difficult_points: Thanks to 引出原因；原文 grow th 是 growth 的断词异常。
has been under way 表示一项过程已经开展并持续至今；原文并列主语后使用 has，属于源文语法异常。

sentences.sentence: Since 1950 more land in the US has been set aside in parks than has been occupied by urban and suburban growth.
sentences.translation: 自1950年以来，美国划作公园的土地面积，比城市和郊区扩张所占用的土地还要多。

structure.text: Since 1950
more land in the US has been set aside in parks
than has been occupied by urban and suburban growth

difficult_points: more...than... 比较两类土地面积：划为公园的土地与被城市扩张占用的土地。
than 从句省略了重复的 land，并采用 has been occupied 的被动形式。

sentences.sentence: And much of what was farmland in the nineteenth century is now forest again.
sentences.translation: 而十九世纪曾经是农田的许多土地，如今又恢复成了森林。

structure.text: much of what was farmland in the nineteenth century
what was farmland in the nineteenth century
is now forest again

difficult_points: what was farmland 是融合关系从句，相当于“曾经是农田的土地”。
much of 修饰 what 从句所指的土地，forest 在系动词后作表语。

sentences.sentence: Taking the best Iowa maize growers as the norm for world food productivity, it has been calculated that less than a tenth of present cropland could support a population of 10 billion.
sentences.translation: 如果把艾奥瓦州最优秀的玉米种植者视为全球粮食生产率的标准，据计算，现有耕地不到十分之一的面积就足以供养一百亿人口。

structure.text: Taking the best Iowa maize growers as the norm for world food productivity
it has been calculated
that less than a tenth of present cropland could support a population of 10 billion

difficult_points: Taking A as B 表示“把 A 视为 B”，在此设定计算所用的生产率基准。
it 是形式主语，that 从句才是被计算得出的实际内容。
less than a tenth of present cropland 是 support 的主语，不是人口比例。

sentences.sentence: In The Environment Game, a vision of a utopia that would be at once high-tech and environmentalist.
sentences.translation: 在《环境游戏》中，描绘了一个同时兼具高科技与环保理念的乌托邦愿景。

structure.text: In The Environment Game
a vision of a utopia
that would be at once high-tech and environmentalist

difficult_points: 该句按原文是缺少谓语的残句，语义上应与下一句作者的设想相连。
that 修饰 utopia；at once A and B 表示“既 A 又 B”。

sentences.sentence: Nigel Calder suggested that 'nourishing but unpalatable primary food produced by industrial techniques - like yeast from petroleum may be fed to animals, so that we can continue to eat our customary meat, eggs. milk, butter, and cheese and so that people in underdeveloped countries can have adequate supplies of animal protein for the first time.'
sentences.translation: 奈杰尔·考尔德提出，可以把“有营养但难以下咽、由工业技术生产的基础食品——例如用石油制成的酵母——喂给动物，这样我们便能继续食用惯常的肉、蛋、奶、黄油和奶酪，也能让欠发达国家的人第一次获得充足的动物蛋白供应”。

structure.text: Nigel Calder suggested
that 'nourishing but unpalatable primary food produced by industrial techniques - like yeast from petroleum may be fed to animals
so that we can continue to eat our customary meat, eggs. milk, butter, and cheese
and so that people in underdeveloped countries can have adequate supplies of animal protein for the first time.'

difficult_points: produced by industrial techniques 是过去分词短语，修饰 primary food；like yeast from petroleum 给出例子。
两个 so that 从句并列，分别说明让富裕社会保留惯常饮食和让欠发达国家获得蛋白质。
原文 eggs. milk 的句点是源文标点异常，这里仍作为同一列举理解。

sentences.sentence: In the long run. tissue-cloning techniques could be used to grow desired portions of meat by themselves.
sentences.translation: 从长远来看，可以利用组织克隆技术单独培育人们想要的肉类部位。

structure.text: In the long run
tissue-cloning techniques
could be used
to grow desired portions of meat by themselves

difficult_points: 原文在 In the long run 后误用句点，但语义上它仍是全句的时间状语。
by themselves 修饰肉的特定部位，表示无需培育整只动物就能单独生长。

sentences.sentence: Once their DNA has been extracted to create cow less steaks and chicken less drumsticks, domesticated species of livestock, bred for millennia to be stupid or to have grotesquely enhanced traits, should be allowed to become extinct, except for a few specimens in zoos.
sentences.translation: 一旦提取了这些家畜的 DNA，用来制造不需要牛的牛排和不需要鸡的鸡腿，那么经过数千年繁育、变得愚钝或具有畸形强化特征的家养牲畜物种，除了动物园保留少数样本外，就可以任其灭绝。

structure.text: Once their DNA has been extracted to create cow less steaks and chicken less drumsticks
domesticated species of livestock
bred for millennia to be stupid or to have grotesquely enhanced traits
should be allowed to become extinct, except for a few specimens in zoos

difficult_points: their 指后文的 domesticated species of livestock，先在 Once 从句中提前出现。
bred for millennia... 是插入式过去分词短语，补充说明家畜长期被人为育种的结果。
except for... 限定 become extinct，表示动物园中的少数个体除外。

sentences.sentence: However, game such as wild deer, rabbits and wild ducks w ill be ever more abundant as farms revert to wilderness, so this could supplement the laboratory-grown meat in the diets of tomorrow's affluent.
sentences.translation: 不过，随着农场恢复为荒野，野鹿、野兔和野鸭等野味会越来越丰富，因此它们可以补充未来富裕人群饮食中的实验室培育肉。

structure.text: However, game such as wild deer, rabbits and wild ducks w ill be ever more abundant
as farms revert to wilderness
so this could supplement the laboratory-grown meat
in the diets of tomorrow's affluent

difficult_points: game 在此指可猎食的野生动物，不是“游戏”；such as 引出例子。
this 指前面所说日益丰富的野味；as 表示农场恢复荒野的伴随变化。
原文 w ill 为 will 的断词异常；the affluent 指富裕人群。

sentences.sentence: With rising personal incomes come rising expectations of mobility.
sentences.translation: 随着个人收入提高，人们对出行能力的期待也随之上升。

structure.text: With rising personal incomes
come
rising expectations of mobility

difficult_points: 这是完全倒装，正常语序是 rising expectations of mobility come with...。
两个 rising 分别修饰 incomes 和 expectations，突出二者同步增长。

sentences.sentence: This is another luxury of today's rich that could become a necessity of tomorrow's global population - particularly if its members choose to live widely dispersed in a post-agrarian wilderness.
sentences.translation: 这是当今富人的另一项奢侈条件，却可能成为未来全球人口的必需品——尤其是在这些人选择分散居住于后农业时代荒野的情况下。

structure.text: This is another luxury of today's rich
that could become a necessity of tomorrow's global population
particularly if its members choose to live widely dispersed in a post-agrarian wilderness

difficult_points: This 指上一句的 mobility；that 修饰 luxury，并说明它未来可能成为必需品。
its members 中 its 指 tomorrow's global population。
live widely dispersed 表示居住地点广泛分散，过去分词 dispersed 作主语补足语。

sentences.sentence: In his recent book Free Flight. James Fallows, a pilot as well as a writer, describes serious attempts by both state and private entrepreneurs in the USA to promote an 'air taxi' system within the price range of today's middle class and perhaps tomorrow's global population.
sentences.translation: 在近作《自由飞行》中，既是飞行员又是作家的詹姆斯·法洛斯描述了美国政府和私营企业家为推广“空中出租车”系统所作的认真尝试；其价格处于当今中产阶级、或许也包括未来全球人口的承受范围之内。

structure.text: In his recent book Free Flight
James Fallows, a pilot as well as a writer
describes serious attempts by both state and private entrepreneurs in the USA
to promote an 'air taxi' system within the price range of today's middle class and perhaps tomorrow's global population

difficult_points: 原文在书名 Free Flight 后误用句点，语义上 In... 是 describes 的出处状语。
a pilot as well as a writer 是 James Fallows 的同位语。
to promote... 修饰 attempts，说明尝试的具体目标；within the price range 表示价格可承受。

expressions.meaning_zh: 为做……而进行的认真尝试
在……可承受的价格范围内

sentences.sentence: Two of the chief obstacles to the science fiction fantasy of the personal plane or hover car are price and danger.
sentences.translation: 个人飞机或悬浮汽车这一科幻构想面临的主要障碍中，有两项是价格和危险性。

structure.text: Two of the chief obstacles to the science fiction fantasy of the personal plane or hover car
are
price and danger

difficult_points: Two of 表明价格和危险只是多个主要障碍中的两个。
to the science fiction fantasy 修饰 obstacles，表示实现这一幻想所面临的障碍。

sentences.sentence: While technological improvements are driving prices down, piloting an aircraft in three dimensions is still more difficult than driving a car in two. and pilot error causes more fatalities than driver error.
sentences.translation: 尽管技术进步正在压低价格，但在三维空间中驾驶飞机仍比在二维平面上驾驶汽车更困难，而且飞行员失误造成的死亡人数也多于驾驶员失误。

structure.text: While technological improvements are driving prices down
piloting an aircraft in three dimensions is still more difficult than driving a car in two
and pilot error causes more fatalities than driver error

difficult_points: While 引导让步从句，说明降价并没有消除操作难度和安全问题。
piloting... 与 driving... 都是动名词短语，在 more difficult than 结构中比较。
原文 two. and 的句点为标点异常，语义上 and 仍连接后一个并列分句。

sentences.sentence: But before long our aircraft and cars will be piloted by computers which arc never tired or stressed.
sentences.translation: 但用不了多久，我们的飞机和汽车将由永远不会疲劳或紧张的计算机驾驶。

structure.text: But before long
our aircraft and cars
will be piloted by computers
which arc never tired or stressed

difficult_points: which 引导定语从句修饰 computers，解释计算机驾驶更安全的原因。
原文 arc 按语境应为 are 的 OCR 错误；will be piloted 是将来时被动语态。

sentences.sentence: So perhaps there are some grounds for optimism when viewing the future of civilization.
sentences.translation: 因此，在展望文明的未来时，我们或许有一些理由保持乐观。

structure.text: So perhaps there are some grounds for optimism
when viewing the future of civilization

difficult_points: there are some grounds for... 表示“有一些……的理由或依据”。
when viewing... 是省略主语和 be 动词的时间从句，逻辑主语泛指我们。

sentences.sentence: With the help of technology, and without putting serious strains on the global environment, possessions, space and mobility can be achieved for all the projected population of the world.
sentences.translation: 借助技术，并且不给全球环境造成严重压力，未来预计的全体世界人口都可以获得财物、空间和出行能力。

structure.text: With the help of technology
without putting serious strains on the global environment
possessions, space and mobility
can be achieved for all the projected population of the world

difficult_points: With... 与 without... 是两个并列的前置状语，分别说明手段和环境限制。
possessions, space and mobility 是被动句主语，呼应前文概括的三类富裕生活需求。
projected population 指根据预测未来将达到的世界人口总量。
